---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new control, playbook, or reference document
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what you'd like added.

## Category

- [ ] New control
- [ ] New playbook
- [ ] New reference document
- [ ] Enhancement to existing content
- [ ] New regulatory mapping

## Regulatory Relevance

Which regulations does this relate to? (e.g., FINRA 2210, SEC Reg S-P)

## Microsoft Learn Reference

Link to relevant Microsoft documentation (if applicable).

## Additional Context

Any additional context, screenshots, or examples.
